summary: Missing `set -o pipefail` in both scripts (license-checker.sh:35, mock-license-lookup.sh:23); pipe failures silently ignored. AWK JSON fallback (license-checker.sh:46-56) is fragile—won't parse nested structures or escaped quotes. Comma-delimited membership checks (lines 74, 77) could fail if SPDX IDs contain commas (edge case). Workflow YAML valid & permissions tight; references pinned. Good modularity & pluggable lookup design. Fallback parsers reduce maintainability. Functional but not production-ready.
